---
title: "The basic Idea of OBIA"
id: materialspat-analysis-000
order: 140
summary: "A short introduction in Object Based Image Analysis."
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-0
  - activity-analysis-1
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - basic
  - mandatory
  - YouTube 
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-000.md"
---

# The basic concept of Object Based Image Analysis

Watch the introduction:

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohMnKg84nDg>

# A bit more basics

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TpuV7DT6seI>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
